title: **Purpose**: Communication tools and feedback mechanisms
content:
**Purpose**: Communication tools and feedback mechanisms

**Core UI Modules**:

```
1. Conversation Interface
- Message composition area
- Response options (guided/free-form toggle)
- Emotion indicators (avatar state)
- Typing indicators with personality

2. RTM Dashboard (Collapsible Overlay)
- Real-time metrics visualization
- Skill progression indicators
- Session history graph
- Achievement notifications

3. Consent Negotiation UI
- Progressive disclosure dialogs
- Boundary setting interface
- Confirmation mechanisms
- Rollback/pause controls

4. Perspective Mode Toggle
- First-person view (user)
- Avatar perspective replay
- Third-person analysis
- Split-screen comparison
```

### 3. Responsive State Management

**Universal State Machine**:
context: From document: AI Review & Expansion Prompt: — chunk 19 (chunk 19/25)
